label: Integrations
items: Custom (HTTP) smart valves can now be controlled from Rhozly — turn them on and off, with an auto-off timer.

Set it up in the Connect wizard: add your valve's control URL and, if needed, customise the request (method, headers, body) with a live preview. Works with your own device endpoint or a vendor/relay cloud API.
Custom valves without a control URL now show their reported on/off state read-only instead of erroring.
